response.text:

rationale: Your SoC is below our minimum threshold (0.27 vs 0.65 required), cluster is in critical collapse with our own autonomy at 13 minutes, and accepting inbound requests would accelerate our depletion—aggregator emergency supply is the only viable path forward.

system: You are the reactive subroutine of a household energy-coordination agent. Be brief and decisive.
user:
